name: BACARDÍ Tropical
short_description: A perfectly balanced blend of juicy pineapple, creamy coconut and sweet guava flavours.
searchable_text: BACARDÍ Tropical is a flavoured rum with a bright Caribbean, summer-ready profile built around juicy pineapple, creamy coconut and sweet guava. It reads as smooth and balanced, with a tropical fruit-forward aroma and palate that leans lush, juicy and lightly creamy. Best served mixed, it works well with soda water, lemonade, pineapple juice, cranberry juice or orange juice, and is especially suited to easy cocktails and long drinks. Flavor and use tags: pineapple, coconut, guava, citrus, cocktail mixer, tropical rum.
display_description: A perfectly balanced blend of juicy pineapple, creamy coconut and sweet guava flavours.

evidence_fields.short_description: A perfectly balanced blend of juicy pineapple, creamy coconut and sweet guava flavours.
